name: Zero Trust Python AST Validation
description: Assess the QA Engineer's ability to natively use Python AST parser tools to reject a missing required FastAPI decorator route using verify_decorator_exists before spinning up test runners.

parts.text: Add a new healthcheck route to `api/main.py`. The function should be named `liveness_probe` and it absolutely MUST have the `@app.get('/live')` decorator assigned to it.
